mapper.update: UPDATE t_sensitive_word SET word = #{word}, match_type = #{matchType}, category = #{category}, severity = #{severity}, action = #{action}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_sensitive_word WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId}

SELECT id, tenant_id, word, match_type, category, severity, action, status, created_at, updated_at FROM t_sensitive_word WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND (tenant_id = #{tenantId} OR tenant_id IS NULL) ORDER BY FIELD(severity, 'BLOCK', 'HIGH', 'MEDIUM', 'LOW')

SELECT id, tenant_id, word, match_type, category, severity, action, status, created_at, updated_at FROM t_sensitive_word WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND (tenant_id = #{tenantId} OR tenant_id IS NULL) AND category = #{category} ORDER BY FIELD(severity, 'BLOCK', 'HIGH', 'MEDIUM', 'LOW')

SELECT id, tenant_id, word, match_type, category, severity, action, status, created_at, updated_at FROM t_sensitive_word WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND tenant_id IS NULL ORDER BY FIELD(severity, 'BLOCK', 'HIGH', 'MEDIUM', 'LOW')
